ResearchProjectDef.label: basic factories
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct basic factories, conveyor belts with splitters, mergers, filters and underground conveyors, as well as factory hoppers to automate certain tasks around the colony.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->pioneered the first integrated production lines
subject_story->transformed a small workshop into a cornerstone of the industrial revolution
subject_story->saw beyond the chaos of factory floors to the beauty of synchronized machinery
subject_gerund->laying the groundwork for modern manufacturing

ResearchProjectDef.label: complex factories
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct complex, specific factories capable of manufacturing components, creating plasteel alloy and much more.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->unveiled the potential of autonomous machines in electronics production
subject_story->bridged the gap between raw materials and advanced technology
subject_story->revolutionized the production of high-tech components and alloys, making them accessible to all
subject_gerund->streamlining the creation of electronics and alloys
